creator: kiwi@oav.net
text:
This port is still needed. Since the "stable" branch is far away from the devel one.
Also the second "release" of domoticz package is more or less buggy.
And... I have also an up to date port ... 
There : https://framagit.org/kiwi/freebsd-ports/-/tree/master/www/domoticz-devel

But between 2019 and 2021.... there is long time...
Is there any way to accelerate update of such ports?
Kind regards,
Xavier
